title: About
text:
Hi, I'm Michael

  
    I'm a data scientist with a deep commitment to place-based social impact work.
    For over [X] years, I've worked in the nonprofit sector, using data to help
    communities understand themselves and drive meaningful change.
  

  
    My work sits at the intersection of data science, geography, and social justice.
    I believe that good data work isn't just about technical skills—it's about
    understanding community context, centering equity, and building tools that
    genuinely serve the people who use them.
  

  What I Do

  
    I specialize in building interactive maps, dashboards, and data products that
    make complex information accessible and actionable. Whether it's helping a
    community organization understand neighborhood change, or building a tool for
    residents to find local resources, I focus on creating solutions that meet
    real needs.
  

  Technical Skills

  
    
      Languages & Tools
      
        R (tidyverse, sf, ggplot2)
        Python
        SQL
        Git/GitHub
      
    

    
      Web & Visualization
      
        Shiny
        Quarto
        Leaflet
        Mapbox
      
    

    
      Data & Analysis
      
        Geospatial Analysis
        Statistical Modeling
        Data Visualization
        Census/ACS Data
      
    

    
      Domain Expertise
      
        Community Development
        Housing & Neighborhoods
        Education & Youth
        Health Equity
      
    
  

  Let's Connect

  
    I'm always interested in connecting with others doing place-based data work,
    exploring new projects, or just chatting about maps and community impact.
  

  
    your.email@example.com
    LinkedIn ·
    GitHub
